raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need command: md5sum of sorted list of files. Use sort and cat? Probably: md5sum <(sort "$FILES")? But $FILES is list of files. We need to read contents of each file sorted by name. So: cat $(printf "%s\n" $FILES | sort) | md5sum. Use xargs? Simpler: cat $(printf "%s\n" $FILES | sort) | md5sum. Provide command.
